summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel and Customer Portal - both fully functional. Backend APIs: 95% pass rate (39/41 tests). Frontend UI: All pages load and navigate correctly.

minor.issue: Duplicate email validation causes test failures when run multiple times - expected behavior, not a bug
Duplicate product name validation causes test failures when run multiple times - expected behavior, not a bug

issues: Product images show 'No Image' placeholder - cosmetic only

passed_tests: Admin Dashboard shows stats (pending orders: 1, total orders: 6, customers, invoices)
Admin Customers page with CRUD operations (list, paginate, create, update, delete)
Admin Products page with tier pricing (Tier 1, 2, 3 pricing rates)
Admin Orders page with status filters
Admin Invoices page with Paid/Pending status
Customer Dashboard shows orders (3) and spend (₹16,189.3)
Customer Products page shows tier-based pricing (Tier 2: ₹80 for Birch Veneer)
Customer Orders page shows customer's orders
Customer Profile page shows customer details
Checkout API creates order from cart
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key warning - should use 32+ bytes key for production (current: 22 bytes)
CSS @import warnings in frontend logs - should move Google Fonts import to top of CSS

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data initialized by server.py startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Admin Panel and Customer Portal are fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly. Frontend loads and navigates properly. Products display tier-based pricing based on customer's pricing_type. Demo data includes 7 customers, 8 products, 6 orders, 4 invoices.

Admin Panel.Dashboard: Shows pending orders (1), total orders (6), due invoices, customer counts
Admin Panel.Customers: Full CRUD with tier assignment, status filters (Active/Pending/Inactive/Archived)
Admin Panel.Products: List with tier pricing, category filters (Plywood/Timber)
Admin Panel.Orders: List with status filters, order details

Customer Portal.Welcome: Shows Sign In / Sign Up buttons at /portal/
Customer Portal.Dashboard: Shows recent orders (3), total spend (₹16,189.3), quick actions
Customer Portal.Cart: Page accessible, empty cart shows 'Start Shopping' link
Customer Portal.Orders: Shows customer's orders with status badges
Customer Portal.Profile: Shows business name, contact info, address
